svg.title: Release Plate — Three-View Orthographic + Section
svg.text: Material: PETG | Scale: 8 px/mm | Dims in mm | All bores concentric per hole
Through top bore row — Y axis 2x scale

g.text: 1. Material: PETG, bore-axis vertical print orientation (Z-up)
2. Tube clearance bore: 6.30mm < D < 6.69mm (only 0.39mm design window)
3. Inner lip hugs collet OD (9.57mm caliper-verified) for lateral constraint
4. Outer bore cradles body end OD (15.10mm caliper-verified)
5. All bore clearances as tight as FDM manufacturing allows
6. 0.1mm chamfer at tube hole entry; 0.3mm x 45° lead-in at outer bore entry
8. Guide pin slots: 3.3 x 7.3mm for 3mm steel dowel pins, in edge tabs
9. Push rod boss: ⌀8mm x 1mm proud, centered on back face at (29.5, 23.5)
10. Bore grid: 2x2, 40mm H x 28mm V center-to-center
11. Validate all bore diameters with single-bore test print before full plate
